Auth.checkEmail: A verification link has been sent to your email address. Please follow the instructions in the email (and check your spam folder) to activate your account.
Auth.loginDescription: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard
Auth.signupDescription: Start your financial journey with us today

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.startingPeriodDesc: Set your initial tracking month and year.
Settings.categoriesDesc: Enable or disable visibility for your asset and liability categories.
Settings.dashboardConfigDesc: Manage how your dashboard displays and calculates data.
Settings.customKpisDesc: Configure global assumptions for financial independence calculations.
Settings.categoryHierarchyDesc: Organize your accounts into specific groups (e.g. Cash, Equities).
Settings.standardGoalsDesc: Set financial targets you want to achieve.
Settings.noGoals: No standard goals found. Click "Add Goal" to get started.
Settings.confirmDeleteGroup: Delete this group? Items will become uncategorized.
Settings.confirmDeleteCategory: Delete this category? ALL historical data will be lost.

NetWorth.title: Net Worth Tracker
NetWorth.desc: Track your assets and liabilities month by month.
NetWorth.empty: No active categories found. Please configure them in Settings.

Contributions.title: Contributions Tracker
Contributions.desc: Track your incoming and outgoing cash flows.
Contributions.empty: No active categories found. Please configure them in Settings.
Contributions.placeholderDetails: e.g. Monthly Salary, Index Fund Buy

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.desc: Overview of your net worth and asset allocation.

Guide.title: Wealth Management System
Guide.description: Welcome to the expert guide for Net Worth Tracker Pro. This system is built on modern personal finance principles to help you command your cash flow and stay on your path to financial freedom.
Guide.step1_desc1: Establishing the Starting Period: Select the month and year you have the most accurate data to begin. This is your 'Ground Zero' for long-term growth calculation.
Guide.step1_desc2: Category Management: Organize your assets into groups like Cash, Stocks, and Real Estate to track diversification effectively.
Guide.step1_desc3: KPI Assumptions: Enter your desired monthly expenses and withdrawal rate (default 4%). The system will calculate your 'Freedom Number' for you.
Guide.step2_desc1: Enter end-of-month balances at the Net Worth page. Only input actual figures at that point in time.
Guide.step2_desc2: Auto-save mechanism: The system saves automatically 1 second after you stop typing. The 'Saved' status will appear at the top right.
Guide.step3_infoDesc: If wealth increases, the system needs to know if it's due to new savings (In-flow) or market performance (Market Gain).
Guide.step3_inflowDesc: Savings from salary, bonuses, or passive income.
Guide.step3_outflowDesc: Major expenses, withdrawals, or portfolio restructuring.
Guide.step4_desc1: Waterfall Chart: Clearly separate your Net Worth into Principal + Cash Flow + Market Profit.
Guide.step4_desc2: Health Checks: Monitor your Liabilities/Assets ratio and the progress of your financial goals.
Guide.formulaFIRE_Hint: * Assumes the Safe Withdrawal Rate set in Settings.
Guide.formulaGrowth_Value: Current NW = Start + Net Contributions + Market Gain
Guide.formulaGain_Desc: Market Gain: The difference between actual NW and (Previous NW + Net Contribution). Reflects investment performance.
